creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Build was for 13.2/amd64

Without this patch I get X509_POLICY_TREE is undefined and related errors. The patch is based on cherry picking that one #if out of an openbsd patch: https://cvsweb.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb/~checkout~/ports/security/p5-Net-SSLeay/patches/patch-SSLeay_xs?rev=1.12&content-type=text/plain
